title: Sheffield driver who killed police worker in crash jailed
description: Dean Tolan, 36, pleaded guilty to causing 29-year-old Ellie Smart's death by dangerous driving.
content:
A man who killed a pedestrian while driving at almost double the road's 30mph speed limit has been jailed for nine years.
Police worker Ellie Smart, 29, was struck by a black Vauxhall Astra on Donetsk Way, Sheffield, while crossing the road just afte... [2080 chars]

title: Kanye West concert in Poland cancelled over antisemitic comments
description: The UK government blocked the rapper from entering the country over his history of making pro-Nazi and racist statements.
content:
A Kanye West concert in Poland has been cancelled, the venue has announced, following government pressure and condemnation over a string of antisemitic, racist and pro-Nazi comments by the US rapper.

title: Pep Guardiola believes ‘mental aspect’ could be key in showdown with Arsenal
description: Pep Guardiola has said Manchester City’s Carabao Cup final win offers them an edge, but Arsenal will be driven to end their title drought
content: Pep Guardiola believes if Manchester City replicate their second-half Carabao Cup final display against Arsenal “for 95 minutes” in Sunday’s pivotal title meeting with Mikel Arteta’s side they will win, though the manager expects his opposite number ... [2073 chars]

title: Rachel Reeves to raise windfall tax on low-carbon electricity generators
description: Chancellor aims to curb households’ rising bills as she consults on reforms to weaken link between gas and electricity prices
content:
Rachel Reeves is poised to raise the government’s windfall tax on low-carbon electricity generators to help to limit UK household energy bills, the Guardian understands.
The chancellor is ready to hike the levy introduced in 2022 to target the excess... [3921 chars]
